subcodes.first_line: O flame of the fire of the love of God! There exists in creation a bounty and a mercy for which thou art responsible, and this is mostly according to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جذوه نار محبت الله فضل و رحمتی در وجود است که مسئولست و این اغلب بحسب
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
